mapper.select: SELECT tp.ID, tp.THEME_ID, tp.PAGE_ID, tp.PAGE_COVER, p.PAGE_NAME, p.PAGE_LABEL, p.DISPLAY_MODE FROM theme_page tp LEFT JOIN page p on p.ID = tp.PAGE_ID WHERE tp.THEME_ID = #{themeId} ORDER BY p.PAGE_SORT
SELECT tp.ID, tp.THEME_ID, tp.PAGE_ID, tp.PAGE_COVER, p.PAGE_NAME, p.PAGE_LABEL, p.DISPLAY_MODE FROM theme_page tp LEFT JOIN page p on p.ID = tp.PAGE_ID WHERE tp.ID = #{themePageId}
